water_usage.detail: Reports total water consumption annually (8.1B gallons in 2024, up 88% since 2019). Reports fleet-wide WUE (~1.1 L/kWh).

energy_usage.detail: Reports total energy consumption and fleet-wide PUE (~1.10). Publishes carbon-free energy percentage.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Some facility-level data available (e.g., Council Bluffs 1B gallons in 2024), but not systematically published for all sites.

ai_specific_data.detail: Published per-query water estimate for Gemini (0.26 ml) via Google Cloud Blog (2025).

water_pledge.detail: Pledged to replenish 120% of water consumed by 2030. Replenished ~4.5B gallons (~64%) in 2024.

water_usage.detail: Reports total water consumption annually (6.4M cubic meters in 2022, 34% YoY increase). Explicitly attributed increase to AI infrastructure.

energy_usage.detail: Reports total energy consumption. Does not consistently report average PUE across fleet.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Does not publish per-facility water or energy breakdowns.

ai_specific_data.detail: No published water or energy data specific to AI workloads or OpenAI models.

water_pledge.detail: Pledged to be water positive by 2030 — replenish more water than consumed globally.

water_usage.detail: Reports water use but with less granularity than peers. Official total figures are less clear than Google or Microsoft.

energy_usage.detail: Reports renewable energy progress (100% renewable by 2025 goal). Only market-based emissions reported, not location-based. Does not report PUE.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Does not publish per-facility water or energy data.

ai_specific_data.detail: No published water or energy data specific to AI/ML workloads.

water_pledge.detail: Pledged to be water positive by 2030. Some AWS regions use zero-water cooling (e.g., Ireland, Sweden).

water_usage.detail: Reports total water consumption (813M gallons in 2023, 95% from data centers). Reports WUE (~0.26 L/kWh), among the lowest in industry.

energy_usage.detail: Reports total energy consumption and renewable energy progress.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Some facility-level detail published (e.g., Prineville, OR uses zero water for cooling).

ai_specific_data.detail: No published water or energy data specific to AI workloads (LLaMA training, Reels inference, etc.).

water_pledge.detail: Committed to net-zero emissions across value chain by 2030; water stewardship investments ongoing.

water_usage.detail: No sustainability report or water usage data published as of March 2026.

energy_usage.detail: No energy consumption data published. Relies on AWS and Google Cloud infrastructure.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Not applicable — Anthropic does not operate its own data centers.

ai_specific_data.detail: No per-model or per-query energy or water data published.

water_usage.detail: No sustainability report or water usage data published as of March 2026.

energy_usage.detail: No energy consumption data published. Relies on third-party cloud infrastructure.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Not applicable — Perplexity does not operate its own data centers.

ai_specific_data.detail: No per-query energy or water data published.
